DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_SALES_REP_SCHEDULE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_SALES_REP_SCHEDULE]
( 
	[SalesRep_ScheduleID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SalesRepID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TimeSlotID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Schedule_Date] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[LP_SalesRep_ScheduleID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_BranchID] [nvarchar](5)  NULL,
	[LP_SalesRepID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_TimeSlotID] [int]  NULL,
	[DateChanged] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [SalesRep_ScheduleID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
